name: REIT Dividends Paid Deduction

eligibility.description: The REIT must distribute at least 90% of its taxable income (excluding net capital gains) to its shareholders annually.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: REITs are allowed a deduction for dividends paid to shareholders, which can reduce the REIT's taxable income to zero if at least 90% of income is distributed.
